languages.text: {n}Ваш вопрос встревожил герцогиню: она тут же переплела сухие пальцы, пытаясь скрыть волнение.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ваш вопрос встревожил герцогиню: она тут же переплела сухие пальцы, пытаясь скрыть волнение.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Your question alarms the Duchess: she immediately interlaces her dry fingers, trying to hide her agitation.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你的问题让女爵警觉起来。她立刻交叉起枯瘦的十指，试图掩饰内心的不安。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your question alarms the Duchess: she immediately interlaces her dry fingers, trying to hide her agitation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你的问题让女爵警觉起来。她立刻交叉起枯瘦的十指，试图掩饰内心的不安。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Votre question a alarmé la duchesse, qui entrelace immédiatement ses doigts secs pour tenter de dissimuler son agitation.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your question alarms the Duchess: she immediately interlaces her dry fingers, trying to hide her agitation.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Düşes telaşlandırıyor. Heyecanını gizlemeye çalışarak kuru parmaklarını hemen birbirine kenetliyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your question alarms the Duchess: she immediately interlaces her dry fingers, trying to hide her agitation.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tu pregunta alarma a la duquesa, que entrelaza inmediatamente los dedos para intentar ocultar su agitación.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your question alarms the Duchess: she immediately interlaces her dry fingers, trying to hide her agitation.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Deine Frage beunruhigt die Herzogin: Sie verschränkt sofort ihre hageren Finger, um ihre Besorgnis zu verbergen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your question alarms the Duchess: she immediately interlaces her dry fingers, trying to hide her agitation.{/n}

languages.text: {n}あなたの質問は公爵夫人を驚かせた。彼女はすぐに乾いた指を絡ませ、動揺を隠そうとする。{/n}
